qa_pair.question: Connect-check the session, then report the ClassName of the instance at the path game.Workspace.Terrain.
What is the ClassName of game.Workspace.Camera?
Using the Studio info tool, is the session currently in edit mode (not a running playtest)? Answer true or false.
Report Workspace.Gravity for a default place using the workspace snapshot tool.
Run Luau that returns the result of 6 multiplied by 7. What value comes back?
Query instances of ClassName "Camera" under Workspace (recursive). Is the total at least 1? Answer true or false.
Using execute_luau, return the Name of the service at game.Lighting.
Read the properties of game.Workspace.Terrain and report whether the instance has children directly under it that are returned by a non-recursive query (true or false) for a fresh baseplate.
Cast a ray from [0, 500, 0] in direction [0, -1000, 0] on a default baseplate. Does it hit something? Answer true or false.
Get the camera's current FieldOfView on a default Studio camera. What number is it?
Use execute_luau to print the text "hello-eval", then read the recent Output logs. Does a log line contain "hello-eval"? Answer true or false.
